methods.Editable append(CharSequence text, int s: Convenience for replace(length(), length(), text, start, end)
methods.Editable append(CharSequence text): Convenience for replace(length(), length(), text, 0, text.length())
methods.void clearSpans(): Removes all spans from the Editable, as if by calling Spannable.removeSpan(Object) on each of them.
methods.InputFilter[] getFilters(): Returns the array of input filters that are currently applied to changes to this Editable.
methods.Editable insert(int where, CharSequence: Convenience for replace(where, where, text, 0, text.length());
Convenience for replace(where, where, text, start, end)
methods.Editable replace(int st, int en, CharSeq: Replaces the specified range (st…en) of text in this Editable with a copy of the slice start…end from source.
Convenience for replace(st, en, text, 0, text.length())
methods.void setFilters(InputFilter[] filters): Sets the series of filters that will be called in succession whenever the text of this Editable is changed, each of which has the opportunity to limit or transform the text that is being inserted.
